title: wollastonia biflora var. canescens
intro: Wollastonia biflora var. canescens, also known as the hairy Wollastonia, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. In herbal preparations, Wollastonia biflora var. canescens is often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
